code: import React,{useMemo}from'react';import{Link}from'react-router-dom';import{getVideoContent}from'../../utils/contentStore';import'./VideoSection.css';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const VideoSection=()=>{const videos=useMemo(()=>getVideoContent().slice(0,6),[]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"video-section",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"videos-grid",children:videos.map(video=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("article",{className:"video-card",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"video-thumbnail",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("img",{src:video.cover,alt:video.title}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"play-button",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("i",{className:"fas fa-play"})})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"video-info",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{className:"video-title",children:video.title}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"video-meta",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("span",{className:"video-author",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("i",{className:"fas fa-user"}),video.author]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("span",{className:"video-views",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("i",{className:"fas fa-eye"}),Number(video.views||0).toLocaleString()]})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Link,{className:"watch-later",to:"/content/".concat(video.id),children:"Open"})]})]},video.id))}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"video-controls",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(Link,{className:"load-more-btn",to:"/catalog/video",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("i",{className:"fas fa-video"})," Browse videos"]})})]});};export default VideoSection;
